envReferenceCheck.summary: Local QA password references now use QA_LOCAL_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD, and the previous QA_TEST_PASSWORD/LOCAL_QA_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD names are absent from runtime and test code paths.

localSeed.command: npm run qa:seed-auth:local && npm run db:local:seed-demo
localSeed.summary: Local wrapper exported QA_LOCAL_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD to seed scripts, QA Auth users were seeded, and local demo data rebuild passed.

localApiTest.summary: Local Supabase API tests passed with QA_LOCAL_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD-driven sign-in.

browserRuntime.command: npm run qa:seed-auth:local && npm run db:local:seed-demo
browserRuntime.summary: Runtime-impacting local Supabase wrapper still builds the local Auth/API env, now using QA_LOCAL_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD for QA account credentials.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 231 tests passed, 15 skipped.

issuesObserved: The previous QA_TEST_PASSWORD name did not clearly communicate that the value belongs to local QA account credentials.
harnessImprovementProposal: Keep local QA-only env names under the QA_ prefix while including the local/account purpose in the variable name.
retrospective.reason: This is a project-specific local QA env naming cleanup, not a reusable Harness rule.
